summary: Completed testing of dual-domain deployment features for AdsGupta. All requested features tested and working correctly. Backend API (11/11 tests) and Frontend UI (all flows verified).

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warning - <span> cannot be child of <option> or <select>. This is a minor HTML validation issue from the Emergent visual editor wrappers that doesn't affect functionality.

test_credentials: No credentials needed - public pages tested
seed_data_creation: Created test CSV files for file upload testing. Created test leads during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dual-domain features verified. Tools domain (SHOW_DEMO=false) mode tested.
passed_tests: Backend Tests (11/11 passed):
- Health endpoint returns healthy status
- Lead capture API works with valid email
- Lead capture handles duplicate emails (Welcome back!)
- Lead capture rejects invalid email format (422)
- Lead capture rejects missing email (422)
- Lead capture works for different sources (neural_map, audit_page, demo_universe)
- Lead count endpoint returns numeric count
- Homepage (/) accessible
- Audit page (/audit) accessible
- Neural map page (/neural-map) accessible
- Multi-vault page (/multi-vault) accessible
Frontend Tests (all passed):
- Tools domain homepage renders correctly with marketing landing page
- Homepage shows 'ADVERTISING AT THE SPEED OF THOUGHT' hero
- Navigation visible with AdsGupta branding
- Audit page (/audit) shows Multi-File Instant Audit dropzone
- 'AI-Powered Analysis' badge visible on audit page
- 'Find Revenue Leaks in 30 Seconds' heading visible
- 'See the Full AI Demo Universe' link visible with data-testid='demo-universe-link'
- Demo link correctly points to https://demoai.adsgupta.com/amazon-audit
- Upload instructions show Sales & Traffic (CSV) and Search Term (XLSX) support
- Supported report types: Search Term, Business, Advertising, Sales & Traffic, Inventory
- Trust indicators visible: Client-side processing, Data never leaves browser, Instant results
- Cross-domain link button responsive on mobile (375px width)
- Demo link within mobile viewport (x=28, width=318, fully visible)
- Multi-Vault page loads correctly on mobile
- Neural Map page loads with responsive buttons
- 'Run 1,000 Simulations' button visible on desktop
- 'Email My Audit' button visible on desktop
- Buttons show truncated text on mobile: 'Simulate' and 'Email'
- Lead capture modal opens when 'Email My Audit' clicked
- Lead capture modal shows email input (data-testid='lead-capture-email')
- Lead capture modal shows submit button (data-testid='lead-capture-submit')
- Lead capture saves email to backend and shows 'You're In!' success message

mocked_apis.note: Demo Universe uses mock data generators for 1,400+ data points as specified in requirements
mocked_apis_list: Demo Universe mock data generators at /modules/demo-universe/data/mockDataGenerators.js
